title: Omaha

jokes.text: Well, this last year has been fun. You know, really fun. I mean, I'm not gonna lie. You know, to have gotten so close to the presidency and then have the American people and Congress reject me was, um... was devastating.
jokes.setup: Selina says the year has been 'fun' and 'really fun'
jokes.punchline: Then immediately admits it was devastating to be rejected by America and Congress
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina - the ironic contradiction between 'fun' and 'devastating' perfectly captures her delusional narcissism and inability to face reality directly

jokes.text: But, um... I did reacquaint myself with an old friend of mine by the name of Selina Meyer. And I like her.
jokes.setup: Selina talks about reacquainting herself with an old friend
jokes.punchline: The friend is herself - she's talking about herself in third person
jokes.explanation: Perfectly narcissistic moment - treating herself as a separate person she needs to get to know again reveals her complete self-absorption

jokes.text: Campaign starts right now, because we are going to make Buddy Calhoun the next governor of this dried coyote turd of a state.
jokes.setup: Amy giving an inspirational campaign speech about Nevada
jokes.punchline: Calls the state a 'dried coyote turd'
jokes.explanation: Vivid, specific insult that perfectly captures Amy's aggressive campaign style and disdain for where she's working

jokes.text: saddle up those emphysema tanks, you inbred cousin-fuckers, 'cause we are going to drag this state into the 20th century. That's right, I said 20th.
jokes.setup: Amy continues her motivational speech about modernizing Nevada
jokes.punchline: Clarifies she said 20th century, not 21st - implying Nevada is so backward they can't even reach modern times
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation and misdirection - the clarification that she meant 20th century is devastating. Perfect Amy cruelty with mathematical precision

jokes.text: Meyer years... Year.
jokes.setup: Selina talks about scholars studying the 'Meyer years'
jokes.punchline: Gary corrects her - it was only one year
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary correction moment - deflating Selina's grandiose language with brutal factual accuracy. The timing and economy are flawless

jokes.text: I'm really much more focused on the tapestry itself... the weave, the thread count, the old lady at the loom...
jokes.setup: Interviewer asks about Hughes getting $20 million advance vs. her smaller one
jokes.punchline: Selina deflects with increasingly ridiculous tapestry metaphors ending with 'the old lady at the loom'
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina deflection - the metaphor gets progressively more absurd as she avoids the embarrassing question about money

jokes.text: Without him, we don't have a Chinaman's chance.
jokes.setup: Ben making a business presentation about getting legislation passed
jokes.punchline: Uses the outdated, offensive term 'Chinaman's chance'
jokes.explanation: Sets up Ben as out of touch and casually offensive, leading to the bigger payoff with his response about his 'Oriental' wives

jokes.text: No, no, no. It's okay. My wife is Oriental. All of them have been. I kind of got yellow 'fev-ah.'
jokes.setup: Someone corrects Ben that 'Chinaman' is inappropriate
jokes.punchline: Ben doubles down, reveals all his wives have been 'Oriental' and he has 'yellow fever'
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation - Ben making it worse by trying to justify his racism. Character-specific cringe that reveals his complete lack of self-awareness

jokes.text: many of them adults, who never learned to read, which is a tragedy.
jokes.setup: Selina talks about pardoning hundreds of nonviolent drug offenders
jokes.punchline: Emphasizes the real tragedy is that they can't read, not that they were unjustly imprisoned
jokes.explanation: Brilliant misdirection - Selina missing the point entirely about criminal justice to focus on literacy. Perfect character obliviousness

jokes.text: And AIDS. Wow. Yes, AIDS. AIDS is a big part of the tapestry.
jokes.setup: Interviewer tries to bring conversation back to Sherman Tanz pardon
jokes.punchline: Selina randomly pivots to AIDS and calls it 'a big part of the tapestry'
jokes.explanation: Absurdist deflection - AIDS as part of her presidential 'tapestry' is both inappropriate and bizarre. Sets up running AIDS gag

jokes.text: Dessert is an apple. I mean, it's no wonder kids are shooting up schools with lunches like these.
jokes.setup: Jonah complaining about healthy school lunch legislation
jokes.punchline: Blames school shootings on healthy lunches
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly inappropriate logic - connecting school shootings to healthy food is perfectly stupid Jonah reasoning. Dark but character-specific

jokes.text: The only green bean I ate was a green jelly bean and I grew up to be so tall, my stupid mom had to get a different car.
jokes.setup: Jonah explaining his childhood diet of junk food
jokes.punchline: Claims eating only jelly beans made him so tall his mom needed a different car
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah - absurd pseudo-science about his height combined with casual cruelty toward his mother. Specific character stupidity

jokes.text: I will fight against green beans the same way that I fought against my deadly disease called cancer.
jokes.setup: Jonah's passionate speech against healthy school lunches
jokes.punchline: Compares fighting vegetables to fighting cancer, calling cancer 'my deadly disease called cancer'
jokes.explanation: Ridiculous equation of vegetables with cancer, plus the redundant 'deadly disease called cancer' shows Jonah's pompous stupidity

jokes.text: Yeah, well, I think sometimes people forget that I was the first female president. Before Montez.
jokes.setup: Discussion about President Montez winning Nobel Peace Prize
jokes.punchline: Selina inserts herself, claiming to be first female president 'before Montez'
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina narcissism - making someone else's achievement about her own brief presidency. Perfect character consistency

jokes.text: I didn't really get a chance to see it because I was... I was out of the country.
jokes.setup: Asked what she thought of Montez's Nobel speech
jokes.punchline: Awkward pause before claiming she was 'out of the country' - clearly lying
jokes.explanation: The pause and obvious lie reveal Selina's jealousy and inability to admit she watched her successor's triumph

jokes.text: 'Cause I've heard she's a complete gash and a half. Yeah, she really is. Yeah.
jokes.setup: Dan asks Jane what Selina is like, having just been nice to her face
jokes.punchline: Jane immediately agrees Selina is 'a complete gash and a half'
jokes.explanation: Perfect two-faced media behavior - the immediate switch from fake niceness to brutal honesty. 'Gash and a half' is memorably crude

jokes.text: On the Anni-fucking-versary of the historic House vote. I feel like we're celebrating my frat house gang rape.
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about the timing of the interview
jokes.punchline: Compares the anniversary to celebrating a gang rape
jokes.explanation: Shockingly inappropriate but perfectly Selina - making her political loss about sexual violence in the most tone-deaf way possible

jokes.text: Except I didn't even get a candlelight vigil. I love candles.
jokes.setup: Selina comparing her situation to a gang rape
jokes.punchline: Complains she didn't get a candlelight vigil, then adds 'I love candles'
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - taking the gang rape metaphor further then pivoting to her shallow love of candles. Perfect Selina narcissism

jokes.text: About the gang bang thing?
jokes.setup: Selina says the world needs to know something
jokes.punchline: Gary thinks she wants to publicize the gang rape metaphor
jokes.explanation: Gary's innocent confusion about what Selina wants to publicize is perfectly in character and references the earlier inappropriate comment

jokes.text: I didn't actually watch the interview, but everybody's talking about how gorgeous you looked.
jokes.setup: Selina asks how she did in the interview
jokes.punchline: Lee admits he didn't watch but deflects with shallow compliment about her appearance
jokes.explanation: Reveals Lee's superficiality and disengagement - he can't be bothered to watch but offers meaningless flattery

jokes.text: I look forward seeing you in your entirety a little later.
jokes.setup: Lee saying goodbye to Selina
jokes.punchline: Awkwardly sexual goodbye in front of everyone
jokes.explanation: Awkward sexual reference in professional setting captures Lee's inappropriate behavior and everyone's discomfort

jokes.text: Do you know what the chief agricultural product of my district in Ohio is? I'll give you a hint... looks like Will's wife's clit.
jokes.setup: Furlong asking about his district's agricultural product
jokes.punchline: Says it looks like Will's wife's clitoris
jokes.explanation: Shocking and specific insult that establishes Furlong as crudely aggressive. The setup makes it worse by being a 'hint'

jokes.text: That's why I spent two months jamming them into that school lunch bill like what, Will? Like me jamming anonymous trucker cock in my mouth at a public restroom well known for that purpose.
jokes.setup: Furlong talking about getting green beans into the lunch bill
jokes.punchline: Compares it to performing oral sex on truck drivers at a highway rest stop
jokes.explanation: Shockingly graphic escalation that's both politically and sexually inappropriate. The specificity makes it more shocking

jokes.text: You want me to call a Japanese porn shoot, see if I can get you a real job sponging up bukkake parties?
jokes.setup: Furlong talking to Kent about how he's fallen
jokes.punchline: Offers to get him a job cleaning up after Japanese porn shoots
jokes.explanation: Characteristically crude Furlong insult that's both racist and sexual. Shows his complete lack of boundaries

jokes.text: I mean, whose balls did I twerk to end up here, in the Triangle Shirtwaist offices?
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about her terrible office location
jokes.punchline: Uses 'twerk' as a verb for servicing someone sexually
jokes.explanation: Creative use of 'twerk' as sexual verb plus the Triangle Shirtwaist reference (famous factory fire) shows her inappropriate historical comparisons

jokes.text: this is the worst place they've ever stuffed an ex-president, and I'm including JFK's coffin.
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about her office being the worst place for an ex-president
jokes.punchline: Says it's worse than JFK's coffin
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark and inappropriate comparison - treating JFK's assassination as a housing issue. Perfect Selina narcissism and tone-deafness

jokes.text: You know what being an ex-president is like? It's like being a man's nipple. People go right by it to jerk off a dick.
jokes.setup: Selina explaining what being an ex-president feels like
jokes.punchline: Compares it to a man's nipple - ignored while people focus on the penis
jokes.explanation: Absolutely brilliant metaphor - original, sexually graphic, and perfectly captures the feeling of irrelevance. One of the best Selina lines ever

jokes.text: it's cha-king. No, it's cha-king.
jokes.setup: Richard corrects Selina that it's 'cha-ching'
jokes.punchline: Selina insists it's 'cha-king' instead of the standard 'cha-ching'
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina stubbornness - refusing to admit she's wrong about even the most basic things like onomatopoeia

jokes.text: I didn't know you were gonna give me AIDS.
jokes.setup: Marjorie referring to Selina's TV interview
jokes.punchline: Thinks Selina literally gave her AIDS as a disease rather than a cause
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback and misunderstanding - Marjorie's literal interpretation of being 'given AIDS' is both innocent and hilarious

jokes.text: Who are you, Ronald Reagan?
jokes.setup: Marjorie says they can't do anything about AIDS
jokes.punchline: Selina compares her to Reagan who ignored the AIDS crisis
jokes.explanation: Sharp political reference - Reagan's failure on AIDS makes this a cutting comparison for someone avoiding the issue

jokes.text: I have AIDS now. That's hilarious. I don't get it.
jokes.setup: Marjorie still confused about the AIDS situation
jokes.punchline: Says she has AIDS now, calls it hilarious, then admits she doesn't understand
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation of Marjorie's confusion - calling having AIDS 'hilarious' while not understanding shows her earnest bewilderment

jokes.text: there's an old Chippewa saying, 'The 'coyotay' always howls...' I'm not that interested in what the 'coyotay' has to say unless he's writing me a check.
jokes.setup: Marjorie starts sharing a Native American saying about a coyote
jokes.punchline: Selina cuts her off, only caring if the coyote is paying her
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina interruption - reducing spiritual wisdom to transactional terms. Shows her complete materialism

jokes.text: Fuck my face!
jokes.setup: Dan being told he's getting the permanent cohost job
jokes.punchline: Extreme sexual exclamation of excitement
jokes.explanation: Perfectly inappropriate Dan reaction - his crude excitement matches his character's lack of professionalism

jokes.text: Yeah, probably wrecked their careers, too.
jokes.setup: Talking about Jane getting rid of previous cohosts
jokes.punchline: The casual admission that she destroys careers
jokes.explanation: Good understated delivery of a dark fact about TV industry ruthlessness

jokes.text: I will not work for less than 87 cents on the dollar.
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about sexism in speaking fees
jokes.punchline: Demands exactly 87 cents on the dollar instead of equal pay
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion of equal pay rhetoric - accepting the wage gap but making it her minimum. Perfect Selina compromise with sexism

jokes.text: Hey, Andrew, I don't care if it's a punch in my big, hairy dick. Okay? Go!
jokes.setup: Andrew says Omaha offer was a slap in the face
jokes.punchline: Selina escalates to a punch in her imaginary penis
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation and gender confusion - Selina imagining herself with male anatomy shows her competitive masculinity

jokes.text: Tell them I'll jump out of a cake with tassels on my sagging tits!
jokes.setup: Selina continuing to compromise for the Omaha gig
jokes.punchline: Offers to be a stripper with aging body
jokes.explanation: Peak desperation moment - Selina willing to debase herself completely, with self-aware description of her aging body

jokes.text: My guess is if you gave her a rail to snort off your dick, she would let you fuck the hole in her septum.
jokes.setup: Discussion about Governor Steptoe's wife allegedly doing cocaine
jokes.punchline: Amy's graphic sexual scenario involving drug damage
jokes.explanation: Shockingly graphic Amy moment - combines drug references with anatomically specific sexual imagery. Peak Amy crudeness

jokes.text: Just do 'cock whore.'
jokes.setup: Buddy puts his foot down about the attack ad being too crude
jokes.punchline: Amy immediately suggests the crudest possible alternative
jokes.explanation: Perfect Amy - completely undermining Buddy's attempt at decency with maximum efficiency. Shows her ruthless nature

jokes.text: Those people really make me laugh.
jokes.setup: Suggesting stuttering as a 'fun' charity cause
jokes.punchline: Selina finding disability amusing rather than sympathetic
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina lack of empathy, shows her complete tone-deafness to appropriate charity work

jokes.text: what was the name of that Iranian trade minister? Gerard Hojati.
jokes.setup: Selina trying to remember an Iranian official's name
jokes.punchline: Gary provides 'Gerard Hojati' - a clearly non-Iranian name
jokes.explanation: Absurd multicultural name confusion - 'Gerard' being obviously European rather than Iranian shows their cultural ignorance

jokes.text: Two eggs, hard scrambled. Red pepper strips? No, no, no, no, no. Not what you ate, Mike.
jokes.setup: Selina asking Mike about Middle East trip details
jokes.punchline: Mike reads his food diary instead of diplomatic notes
jokes.explanation: Classic Mike incompetence - mixing up his personal food diary with official diplomatic records. Perfect character confusion

jokes.text: I thought I'd never work again. [...] Me, too!
jokes.setup: Mike expressing relief about getting paid
jokes.punchline: Wendy's agreement about his unemployability
jokes.explanation: Good marital cruelty beat. Simple but effective.

jokes.text: That's my daughter, ma'am.
jokes.setup: Selina suggests putting down Maude who bit Mike
jokes.punchline: Mike clarifies Maude is his daughter, not a dog
jokes.explanation: Classic misunderstanding - Selina treating Mike's daughter like an animal that should be euthanized shows her disconnect

jokes.text: Omaha is a 20-minute drive right across the border to Council Bluffs, Iowa... where they have their annual Madison Monroe dinner.
jokes.setup: Selina explaining why she wants to go to Omaha
jokes.punchline: Revealing her real presidential campaign motivation
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection revealing Selina's true political ambitions, well-structured reveal

jokes.text: Why would I need your fucking vote? You wouldn't. What a crazy idea.
jokes.setup: Gary says Selina has his vote for president
jokes.punchline: Selina realizes Gary can't vote for her and calls it crazy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina cruelty - dismissing Gary's support when she realizes it's meaningless. Shows her transactional view of relationships

jokes.text: I'm gonna run for president again.
jokes.setup: All the buildup about Omaha and secret plans
jokes.punchline: The inevitable revelation of her delusion
jokes.explanation: Perfect culmination of the episode's setup, inevitable but still satisfying reveal

jokes.text: I even got four and a half pity handies out of it, so I kept shaving.
jokes.setup: Jonah explaining why he faked having cancer
jokes.punchline: Got sexual favors out of sympathy so continued the lie
jokes.explanation: Perfectly awful Jonah - exploiting cancer sympathy for sexual gratification. The 'four and a half' specificity makes it worse

jokes.text: you human fucking Pap smear.
jokes.setup: Dan insulting Jonah's appearance
jokes.punchline: Compares him to a cervical cancer test
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly creative insult - comparing someone to a medical test is both original and medically themed given the cancer context

jokes.text: Just because I look like a penis.
jokes.setup: Jonah complaining about Dan making fun of him
jokes.punchline: Admits he looks like a penis
jokes.explanation: Rare moment of Jonah self-awareness - acknowledging his phallic appearance with surprising honesty

jokes.text: Yeah, but I didn't expect anybody to object, did I? This was a test, folks, and you all failed.
jokes.setup: Catherine reminds Selina she said she wouldn't run if anyone objected
jokes.punchline: Selina reveals it was a 'test' they all failed
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina manipulation - retroactively making their reasonable objections into a test they failed. Classic narcissistic reframing

jokes.text: He can read the newspaper on the toilet by the light of his own shit.
jokes.setup: Ben saying Sherman Tanz is radioactive
jokes.punchline: Claims his feces literally glow from corruption
jokes.explanation: Absolutely brilliant escalation of 'radioactive' metaphor - combining corruption with literal nuclear waste imagery. Peak Ben crudeness and creativity

jokes.text: You know, maybe if we teach them how to read a condom wrapper, they wouldn't get AIDS in the first place.
jokes.setup: Ben joining Selina's AIDS and literacy fund
jokes.punchline: Suggests combining the two causes inappropriately
jokes.explanation: Clever callback connecting the two charitable causes in an inappropriate but logical way. Shows Ben's cynical problem-solving

tmdb_overview: One year after losing the presidency, Selina attempts to secure her legacy. Dan tries to ingratiate himself at his new job. Amy's brash D.C.-style personality proves too much for her new co-workers.
insight: Season 6 opener lands 53 jokes in 37 minutes—character chaos sustains momentum.
